items.title: Who is Mykhailo Drapatyi, Ukraine's new commander-in-chief?
items.dek: Drapatyi becomes Ukraine's third commander-in-chief since Russia's full-scale invasion in February 2022.
items.body: Drapatyi becomes Ukraine's third commander-in-chief since Russia's full-scale invasion in February 2022.

items.title: Mysterious white foam draws crowds on Nigerian highway
items.dek: The environmental agency has warned people to avoid going near the substance as it could pose a health risk.
items.body: The environmental agency has warned people to avoid going near the substance as it could pose a health risk.
